observation.messy_prompt:
Customer email: Need 5,000 units by day 12. Same PC as last time. Can you do $0.65/unit?
Operator note: M3 sounded rough this afternoon; might need maintenance.
Inventory: ABS=150kg, PC=60kg, PP=90kg.
Machine log: M1 uptime=97%, M2 uptime=93%, M3 uptime=85%.
HR: operator O1 out sick one day this period.
Current jobs: J106 due day 3 high priority; J115 due day 4 low priority; J105 due day 5 high priority.
